inputs.text:
A cinematic science-fantasy duel scene continues smoothly from the first frame to the last frame.

Maintain full consistency of both characters, their identities, proportions, clothing, armor, weapons, and the environment. Preserve the same platform, lighting, atmosphere, and composition.

Motion is subtle and realistic: Hadrian shifts forward slightly and adjusts his sword arm, while Ulurani subtly changes stance and balance in response. Their distance remains nearly the same.

Add natural secondary motion: slight cloth movement, small hand adjustments, slight body weight shift, drifting smoke or sparks, and a very subtle camera push-in.

The motion should interpolate naturally between the first and last frames, creating a smooth, continuous transition with no abrupt changes.

Realistic timing, grounded physics, cinematic pacing, no exaggerated motion.

no character redesign, no face change, no identity drift, no scale change, no size change, no new characters, no missing characters, no limb distortion, no extra limbs, no mutation

no environment change, no background change, no lighting change, no color shift, no camera jump, no scene cut

no large motion, no sudden movement, no teleporting, no fast action, no exaggerated animation

no blur artifacts, no flickering, no frame tearing, no unstable details
